name: gb200_nvl576_hierarchical
_comment: Realistic NVL576: 8 NVL72 racks stitched by a scale-out InfiniBand fabric. Fabric 'nvlink5' is intra-rack only (72-port NVSwitch, 900 GB/s, 0.5 us). Fabric 'ib' is the inter-rack scale-out network (8 racks, 400 GB/s, 2.5 us per traversal). A collective over ≤72 ranks stays on nvlink5; a collective spanning up to 576 ranks escalates into ib, paying α = 0.5 + 2.5 = 3.0 us and being bandwidth-floored to 400 GB/s.
